name: Vikunja
description: Manage Vikunja tasks and projects: list, create, update, and delete tasks with due dates and priorities

credentials_required.label: Vikunja Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your Vikunja instance (e.g. https://vikunja.example.com)

tools.name: vikunja_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a Vikunja project

tools.name: vikunja_get_task
tools.description: Get details of a single Vikunja task

tools.name: vikunja_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a Vikunja project

author: freddy-schuetz
